goal: Fix Daily AI Info data-build experience for Juya News, diagnosable Folo timeout/fallback, paper scoring/selection, and persistent paper state.
inputs: Paper fallback: arXiv API with old filter rules
Paper score dimensions: application_relevance, new_signal, engineering_utility, timeliness_rarity
done_when: paper-state.json exists and contains scored papers with abstract and if_pushed
run-log.jsonl exists and contains current run_id
Folo timeout/fallback is represented in digest-data.json logs when timeout is forced
